history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 2, column B, facing right. The goal is at row 8, column H. To reach it, I need to go down to row 4, then move right to column H, then go down to the goal. Immediate step: turn clockwise to face down, then move forward to row 3, column B (safe floor). This avoids the lava at (2,G) and allows me to proceed downward.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down at row 2, column B. The cell directly ahead is row 3, column B, which is floor (`.`). Moving forward will take me down. I need to eventually go to row 8, column H.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 3, column B, facing down. The cell directly ahead (row 4, column B) is floor. Moving forward will bring me to row 4. From there I can turn right and move east to column H, then go down to the goal at row 8.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 4, column B, facing down. Directly ahead at row 5, column B is lava (L). I cannot move forward. To reach the goal at row 8, column H, I need to go right (east) along row 4, then down column H. From facing down, turning counter-clockwise will make me face right.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right. The cell ahead (row 4, column C) is floor. Moving forward will take me to column C. I can continue east along row 4 to reach column H, then go down to row 8.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 4, column C, facing right. The cell ahead (row 4, column D) is floor. Moving forward continues east towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 4, column D, facing right. The cell ahead (row 4, column E) is floor. Moving forward continues east towards column H, which is on the path to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 4, column E, facing right. The next cell ahead (row 4, column F) is floor. Moving forward continues east towards column H, then I can turn south to reach the goal at row 8, column H.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 4, column F, facing right. The next cell ahead (row 4, column G) is floor. Moving forward continues east towards column H, then I can turn south to reach the goal at row 8, column H.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 4, column G, facing right. The next cell ahead (row 4, column H) is floor. Moving forward continues east to column H, from where I can turn clockwise to face south and then move down to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 4, column H, facing right. The goal is directly below at row 8, column H, and the path downward through rows 5-7 column H is clear (floor). I need to turn clockwise to face south.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down at row 4, column H. The next cell directly below is floor, so I can move forward toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 5, column H, facing down. The cell directly below (row 6, column H) is floor, and below that is floor, then the goal at row 8. So I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6, column H, facing down. The cell directly below (row 7, column H) is floor, and then the goal is at row 8. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 7, column H, facing down. The cell directly ahead is row 8, column H, which is the goal (O). I will move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
